title: Carrot Sambal
excerpt: Ingredients 4 medium-large carrots, peeled and grated 80 g pitted dates (or raisins), roughly chopped 1 large green chilli, seeds removed (if you like) and finely chopped juice of 1 lime grated zest of 2 limes salt and white pepper to taste 65 ml thick coconut cream Method Mix all the ingredients in a …
html:
Ingredients

  • 4 medium-large carrots, peeled and grated
  • 80 g pitted dates (or raisins), roughly chopped
  • 1 large green chilli, seeds removed (if you like) and finely chopped
  • juice of 1 lime
  • grated zest of 2 limes
  • salt and white pepper to taste
  • 65 ml thick coconut cream

Method

Mix all the ingredients in a mixing bowl, cover and place in the fridge for at least an hour before serving.

Makes about 600 – 800 ml sambal

Easy!
